title: Europe’s power grid breaks apart as Brussels rulemaking fails to keep pace
summary_full: A set of 'network codes' drawn up in the noughties governs what has been called 'the world's largest machine' – but are they still fit for purpose?
summary_public: A set of 'network codes' drawn up in the noughties governs what has been called 'the world's largest machine' – but are they still fit for purpose?
